message:
feat(test): add proptest_format.rs and proptest_table.rs (35 tests each)

proptest_format.rs (35 tests):
- OutputFormat parse/display round-trip, case-insensitivity, "text" alias
- Boolean queries (is_json, is_plain, is_rich) for all variants
- EffectiveFormat resolution for Plain/Json/Auto
- Style enabled/disabled: all color methods, severity mapping, status colors
- Style::from_format produces disabled style for Plain/Json

proptest_table.rs (35 tests):
- Column builder chain: header, alignment, min_width, max_width
- Table len/is_empty tracking across add_row calls
- Plain render contains all cells and headers
- JSON render: valid array, correct length, key normalization, ANSI stripping
- strip_ansi: identity on plain text, idempotent, removes ESC sequences
- Alignment-aware rendering via public API (Left/Right/Center)
- min_width/max_width constraints in rendered output
- Render determinism, custom separator, line count invariants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
